def negative_python_perf_layer_garbage_collection_cleanup_large_list_cleared_but_retained():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_garbage_collection_cleanup_large_list_cleared_but_retained"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: Garbage collection and cleanup. Flag long-lived lists cleared after spikes while still retaining oversized capacity-sensitive state."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
